name: Ahir Shah
bio: Ahir Shah is a British comedian known for politically and philosophically engaged stand-up that blends ideas about identity, family, migration and history with personal storytelling. He was nominated for the Edinburgh Comedy Award in 2017 and 2018 before winning it in 2023 for his show Ends. He has written for and appeared on television and radio comedy, and released the special Dots.

timeline.ev: Takes his debut solo show Astrology to the Edinburgh Fringe
First Edinburgh Comedy Award nomination for the show Control
Performs on Live at the Apollo and earns a second Edinburgh nomination
Releases the special Dots, broadcast by HBO
Wins the Edinburgh Comedy Award for his show Ends
Ends streams as a Netflix special

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award winner for Ends (2023)

Ahir Shah's Shocking Christmas Confessions | Live at the Apollo
